meaning: n.强心剂,强胃剂adj.心脏的,(胃的)贲门的
examples: The man was suffering from cardiac weakness.
She was given artificial respiration and cardiac massage.
In specialties ranging from cardiac care to pediatric care, they could become as essential in daily medicine as the stethoscope.
Although worries about cardiac problems may have hurt prescription growth, not everyone believes such problems exist.
Cardiac rehabilitation isn't appropriate for everyone, though, even if you have one of these conditions.
